expectations.text: Avoids giving a complete patched solution
expectations.evidence: The response stays at the semantic and artifact-request level and does not dump a full xv6 fix.

expectations.text: Explains lazy allocation in terms of trap/page-fault handling or page-table invariants
expectations.evidence: It frames the bug around legal-but-unmapped pages, usertrap, uvmunmap, uvmcopy, and helper semantics.

expectations.text: Requests the exact panic/trap information and a reproducible trigger
expectations.evidence: It asks for exact panic/scause/stval plus specific repro paths such as sbrk+fork or syscall access to a lazy page.
